PR surface: Source +2, Tests +51. Total +53 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: no. current-main reproduction remains: current main at 0211a3aa already contains the OAuth narrowing and normalized expiry return. The original drift is source-proven from the pre-fix diff/history, but I did not run gates in this read-only review.

target.title: fix(auth): restore auth status type narrowing
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes current-main type drift that blocks changed gates before the schema-runtime PR can be rechecked.

- Narrow main-store credentials to OAuth before reading OAuth-only expiry fields.
- Return the normalized expiry timestamp after validating model-auth status expiry input.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/auth-profiles/oauth-manager.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/models-auth-status.test.ts` passed: 2 shards, 50 tests, 9.26s.
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check src/agents/auth-profiles/oauth-manager.ts src/gateway/server-methods/models-auth-status.ts` passed.
- `git diff --check` passed.
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/agents/auth-profiles/oauth-manager.ts src/gateway/server-methods/models-auth-status.ts` passed.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Current `main` typecheck fails while preparing auth/profile status code, blocking unrelated PR changed gates.

Real environment tested: Local linked worktree using repo test/lint wrappers; remote changed gate pending.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: See Verification above.

Evidence after fix: Focused auth-manager and gateway model-auth status tests pass; targeted lint/format/whitespace checks pass on the touched files.

Observed result after fix: The touched code now narrows OAuth-only fields before access and returns a validated timestamp shape for the gateway auth status response.

What was not tested: Remote `pnpm check:changed` is pending and will be added after PR creation.
